---
title: "Gemini — account-1 — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico (so account-1)"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import json
import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

ACCOUNT_FILTER = "1"  # Este notebook eh dedicado a account-1

PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Gemini"
con = duckdb.connect()
# conversations e messages tem coluna account → filtra direto
for table in ("conversations", "messages"):
    p = PROCESSED / f"gemini_{table}.parquet"
    if p.exists():
        con.execute(
            f"CREATE VIEW {table} AS "
            f"SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{p}') WHERE account = '{ACCOUNT_FILTER}'"
        )
# tool_events nao tem account → filtra via conversation_id
p = PROCESSED / "gemini_tool_events.parquet"
if p.exists():
    con.execute(
        "CREATE VIEW tool_events AS "
        f"SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{p}') "
        "WHERE conversation_id IN (SELECT conversation_id FROM conversations)"
    )

# Google Gemini palette: azul + secundario
SOURCE_COLOR = "#4285F4"
SECONDARY = "#1A73E8"
ACCENT = "#9AA0A6"
MUTED = "#D1D5DB"


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df, **kwargs):
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def plotly_bar(x, y, title, color=SOURCE_COLOR, height=350, orientation="v"):
    if orientation == "h":
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(y=x, x=y, marker_color=color, orientation="h"))
    else:
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=x, y=y, marker_color=color))
    fig.update_layout(
        title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
    )
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events
""").df()

range_dt = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        MIN(created_at) AS oldest,
        MAX(created_at) AS newest_created,
        MAX(updated_at) AS newest_updated
    FROM conversations
""").df()

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": f"{range_dt['oldest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d} → {range_dt['newest_created'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d}"},
    {"Tabela": "messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
]))
```

> **Sobre este documento.** Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do Gemini
> filtrados pra **account-1** (`hello.marlonlemes@gmail.com`). Para a
> visao consolidada das 2 contas, ver `gemini.qmd`. Para a outra conta,
> `gemini-acc-2.qmd`.
>
> Schema raw eh **posicional** (Google batchexecute, sem keys) — caminhos
> descobertos empiricamente em probe 2026-05-02. `is_pinned` extraido de
> `c[2]` do listing MaZiqc.

# 1. Dados disponiveis

## 1.1 Conversations

```{python}
#| label: conv-schema

cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(title) AS title,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        SUM(is_pinned::INT) AS pinned,
        SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) AS preserved,
        COUNT(last_seen_in_server) AS last_seen,
        COUNT(settings_json) AS with_settings
    FROM conversations
""").df()
total = cov["total"].iloc[0]

def conv_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(cov[field].iloc[0]), int(total))

schema_conv = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Namespaced `account-1_<uuid>`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "source", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre 'gemini'", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "title", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Titulo do chat (vem do listing)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("title")},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "`created_at_secs` do listing", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "updated_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "`max(turn[4][0])` — proxy (Gemini nao expoe updated_at)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_count", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "user + assistant msgs", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Last model name (e.g. '2.5 Flash', 'Nano Banana')", "Cobertura": conv_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "mode", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre 'chat'", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "url", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Link `gemini.google.com/app/<short_id>`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "is_pinned", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Campo `c[2]` do listing MaZiqc", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['pinned'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_preserved_missing", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "True se conv sumiu do servidor", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['preserved'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "last_seen_in_server", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Data da ultima run em que servidor retornou", "Cobertura": conv_cov("last_seen")},
    {"Campo": "settings_json", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON com `locale` e `models_used`", "Cobertura": conv_cov("with_settings")},
])
show_df(schema_conv)
```

```{python}
#| label: conv-sample
#| column: page

sample_conv = con.execute("""
    WITH
    pinned_one AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE is_pinned LIMIT 1
    ),
    preserved AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE is_preserved_missing LIMIT 1
    ),
    longest AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations ORDER BY message_count DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    nano_banana AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE model LIKE 'Nano Banana%' LIMIT 1
    ),
    thinking_model AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE model LIKE '%Thinking%' LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (conversation_id)
        substr(conversation_id, 12, 16) AS short_id,
        substr(title, 1, 50) AS title,
        message_count AS msgs, model,
        is_pinned, is_preserved_missing AS preserved,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM pinned_one
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM preserved
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM longest
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM nano_banana
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM thinking_model
    )
    ORDER BY conversation_id
""").df()
show_df(sample_conv)
```

## 1.2 Messages

Cada turn do Gemini gera 2 msgs (user + assistant). Schema raw posicional —
caminhos descobertos via probe.

```{python}
#| label: msg-schema

mcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        COUNT(thinking) AS thinking,
        COUNT(asset_paths) AS asset_paths,
        COUNT(attachment_names) AS attachment_names,
        SUM(CASE WHEN content_types = 'text+image' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS multi_modal
    FROM messages
""").df()
mtotal = mcov["total"].iloc[0]

def msg_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(mcov[field].iloc[0]), int(mtotal))

schema_msg = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "`<conv_id>_t<idx>_<role>`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "sequence", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Ordem cronologica", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "role", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "'user' ou 'assistant'", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "content", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Texto da msg (extracao posicional)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Model do turn (so em assistant msgs)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "thinking", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Thinking blocks (heuristica >=200 chars)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("thinking")},
    {"Campo": "asset_paths", "Tipo": "list[str]?", "Descricao": "Paths locais de imagens", "Cobertura": msg_cov("asset_paths")},
    {"Campo": "attachment_names", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON list de filenames", "Cobertura": msg_cov("attachment_names")},
])
show_df(schema_msg)
```

```{python}
#| label: msg-sample
#| column: page

sample_msg = con.execute("""
    WITH
    user_msg AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='user' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    asst_msg AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='assistant' AND thinking IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    with_thinking AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE thinking IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    multi_modal AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE content_types = 'text+image' LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT
        role,
        substr(content, 1, 50) AS content_preview,
        word_count AS wc,
        model,
        content_types,
        thinking IS NOT NULL AS has_thinking,
        asset_paths IS NOT NULL AS has_assets
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM user_msg
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM asst_msg
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM with_thinking
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM multi_modal
    )
""").df()
show_df(sample_msg)
```

## 1.3 Tool Events

```{python}
#| label: evt-schema

ecov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(tool_name) AS tool_name,
        COUNT(metadata_json) AS metadata_json
    FROM tool_events
""").df()

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "event_type", "Descricao": "'image_generation'"},
    {"Campo": "tool_name", "Descricao": "'gemini_image' (Nano Banana / Imagen)"},
    {"Campo": "metadata_json", "Descricao": "JSON com `url`, `local_path`, `response_id`"},
    {"Campo": "Total events nesta conta", "Descricao": f"{int(ecov['total'].iloc[0]):,}"},
]))
```

# 2. Cobertura e gaps

## 2.1 Convs sem `model`

```{python}
#| label: model-gap

no_model = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE model IS NULL) AS sem_model,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE model IS NOT NULL) AS com_model
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes
""").df()

fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=no_model["mes"], y=no_model["com_model"],
                     name="Com model", marker_color=SOURCE_COLOR))
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=no_model["mes"], y=no_model["sem_model"],
                     name="Sem model", marker_color=MUTED))
fig.update_layout(
    barmode="stack", title="Convs por mes — com e sem model",
    height=350, template="plotly_white",
    xaxis=dict(type="category"),
    margin=dict(t=50, b=80, l=40, r=20),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2),
)
fig.show()
```

## 2.2 Cobertura de thinking

```{python}
#| label: thinking-coverage

think_cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        role,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(thinking) AS com_thinking,
        ROUND(COUNT(thinking) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct
    FROM messages
    GROUP BY role ORDER BY role
""").df()
show_df(think_cov)
```

```{python}
#| label: thinking-by-model

think_by_model = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        model,
        COUNT(*) AS total_msgs,
        COUNT(thinking) AS com_thinking,
        ROUND(COUNT(thinking) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_thinking
    FROM messages
    WHERE role='assistant' AND model IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY model
    ORDER BY com_thinking DESC
""").df()

if not think_by_model.empty:
    fig = px.bar(think_by_model, x="model", y="pct_thinking",
                 title="% de assistant msgs com thinking — por modelo",
                 color_discrete_sequence=[SOURCE_COLOR],
                 height=350, text="pct_thinking")
    fig.update_layout(template="plotly_white", margin=dict(t=50, b=80, l=40, r=20))
    fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=-25)
    fig.show()
show_df(think_by_model)
```

## 2.3 Asset paths

```{python}
#| label: asset-coverage

asset_cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        content_types,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(asset_paths) AS com_paths,
        ROUND(COUNT(asset_paths) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct
    FROM messages
    WHERE content_types = 'text+image'
    GROUP BY content_types
""").df()
if not asset_cov.empty:
    show_df(asset_cov)
else:
    print("Sem msgs multi-modais nesta conta.")
```

# 3. Volumes e distribuicoes

## 3.1 Conversas criadas por mes

```{python}
#| label: conv-timeline

timeline = con.execute("""
    SELECT strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(x=timeline["mes"], y=timeline["n"],
                 title="Conversations criadas por mes", height=350)
fig.update_xaxes(type="category")
fig.show()
```

## 3.2 Mensagens por role

```{python}
#| label: roles

roles = con.execute("""
    SELECT role, COUNT(*) AS n FROM messages GROUP BY role ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(x=roles["role"], y=roles["n"], title="Messages por role", height=300)
fig.show()
```

## 3.3 Top modelos

```{python}
#| label: top-models

top = con.execute("""
    SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    WHERE model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
""").df()

if not top.empty:
    fig = plotly_bar(x=top["model"], y=top["n"], title="Top modelos (last seen per conv)", height=350)
    fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=-25)
    fig.show()
show_df(top)
```

## 3.4 Modelos em assistant messages

```{python}
#| label: model-msgs

mod_msgs = con.execute("""
    SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS n FROM messages
    WHERE role = 'assistant' AND model IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY model ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

if not mod_msgs.empty:
    fig = plotly_bar(x=mod_msgs["model"], y=mod_msgs["n"],
                     title="Modelos por mensagem assistant",
                     color=SECONDARY, height=350)
    fig.update_xaxes(tickangle=-25)
    fig.show()
```

## 3.5 ToolEvents

```{python}
#| label: tool-events

evts = con.execute("""
    SELECT event_type, tool_name, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM tool_events GROUP BY event_type, tool_name ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

if not evts.empty:
    fig = plotly_bar(x=evts["event_type"], y=evts["n"],
                     title="ToolEvents por event_type", height=300)
    fig.show()
show_df(evts)
```

## 3.6 Distribuicao de tamanho (msgs por conv)

```{python}
#| label: conv-size

sizes = con.execute("""
    SELECT message_count FROM conversations WHERE message_count > 0
""").df()

bins = [0, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 9999]
labels = ["1", "2", "3-5", "6-10", "11-20", "21-50", "51-100", "100+"]
sizes["bin"] = pd.cut(sizes["message_count"], bins=bins, labels=labels, include_lowest=True)
hist = sizes["bin"].value_counts().reindex(labels).reset_index()
hist.columns = ["bin", "n"]

fig = plotly_bar(x=hist["bin"].astype(str), y=hist["n"],
                 title=f"Distribuicao de msgs por conv (n={len(sizes):,})",
                 height=300)
fig.update_xaxes(title="Msgs por conv")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()
```

# 4. Preservation + features distintivas

## 4.1 Pinned

```{python}
#| label: pinned-detail

pinned_table = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 12, 16) AS short_id,
        title,
        message_count AS msgs,
        model,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_pinned = TRUE
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
""").df()

if not pinned_table.empty:
    show_df(pinned_table)
else:
    print("Nenhuma conv pinada nesta conta.")
```

## 4.2 Preservation — convs sumidas do servidor

```{python}
#| label: preserved-detail

preserved_table = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 12, 16) AS short_id,
        title,
        message_count AS msgs,
        strftime(last_seen_in_server, '%Y-%m-%d') AS last_seen,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_preserved_missing = TRUE
    ORDER BY last_seen_in_server DESC
""").df()

if not preserved_table.empty:
    show_df(preserved_table)
else:
    print("Nenhuma conv preservada nesta conta.")
```

## 4.3 Multi-modal coverage

```{python}
#| label: multi-modal

mm = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN content_types = 'text+image' THEN 'multi-modal'
             ELSE 'text-only' END AS tipo,
        COUNT(*) AS msgs
    FROM messages WHERE role = 'assistant'
    GROUP BY tipo ORDER BY msgs DESC
""").df()

fig = px.pie(mm, values="msgs", names="tipo",
             title="Assistant messages — text vs multi-modal",
             color_discrete_sequence=[SOURCE_COLOR, MUTED],
             height=350)
fig.update_layout(template="plotly_white", margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20))
fig.show()
```

# 5. Limitacoes conhecidas

| Item | Status |
|---|---|
| Branches/drafts | nao implementado v3 — poucos casos detectados |
| Search/grounding citations | estrutura nao mapeada (TODO probe) |
| Deep Research markdown | extraidos offline pelo `asset_downloader`, em `assets/` |
| `updated_at` real | Gemini nao expoe — usa max(turn timestamps) como proxy |
| Voice / TTS audio | nao identificado em probe |
| Share URLs | upstream-only — nao modifica state |
